name: Prompt Optimizer
description: Iteratively improve prompts embedded in application source code through autonomous test-score-refine loops.
longDescription:
Finds prompts in source code (Python strings, TypeScript/JavaScript, YAML configs, JSON files), extracts them, and optimizes in-place. Combines **deterministic verifiers** (source file syntax, template variable preservation, token count, format compliance, regression tests) with **4 LLM-judged criteria**: output quality on test cases, instruction clarity, robustness against edge cases, and conciseness.

Auto-detects template variables (`{{user_input}}`, `{context}`) and preserves them across edits. Each round: run the prompt against test inputs, score outputs, make one targeted change in the source file, re-score, keep or revert. Includes live `dashboard.html`. Supports full, audit-only, focused, and re-score modes.
